markets.title: OpenAI exceeds $1T valuation by end of 2027
markets.canonical_text: OpenAI private or public market valuation is at least 1 trillion USD by 2027-12-31.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if a credible funding, IPO, acquisition, or public-market valuation source reports OpenAI at or above 1 trillion USD before 2028-01-01.

markets.title: OpenAI valuation above $500B by end of 2027
markets.canonical_text: OpenAI private or public market valuation is at least 500 billion USD by 2027-12-31.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if a credible funding, IPO, acquisition, or public-market valuation source reports OpenAI at or above 500 billion USD before 2028-01-01.

markets.title: Anthropic is first company to announce AGI by 2027
markets.canonical_text: Anthropic is the first named company to announce an AGI system before 2028-01-01.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if Anthropic is judged first among listed companies to announce AGI before 2028-01-01.
